correct-folder: output contains 'withdrawaldeclinenotified'

notes: Dug into individual slice JSON files violating the index-only rule; added extra 'modified' entry not in the index diff
is-valid-json and correct-slice-name/folder/context pass in both configs — they don't discriminate skill value well
is-bare-json-array and correct-action are the key differentiators — without_skill fails these 2/3 times
Eval 1 baseline is contaminated — agent found .claude/wip/evdb-diff.md and used it, explaining the 7/7 pass rate; real baseline would likely be lower
With-skill is 4x faster (19.8s vs 84.2s) and uses 3x fewer tokens (10.8K vs 30.2K)
With-skill uses ~4 tool calls vs 8-29 without — dramatically more focused execution
